steps.title: Identify what the question requires
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize both the duration (how long Cohen and Rodrigues have been working) and the purpose (what they have been working toward). Any choice missing either element fails.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Evaluate all four choices:
  • Choice A — At the Gullah Museums in Hilton Head Island and Georgetown, South Carolina, visitors can learn more about the Gullah people who have lived in the region for centuries.: focuses on what visitors can learn, not on the duration or purpose of the women's work. ✗
  • Choice B — Louise Miller Cohen and Vermelle Rodrigues have worked to preserve the culture of the Gullah people, who have lived in the United States since the 18th century.: states the purpose but gives no start date for Cohen's and Rodrigues's work — missing the duration. ✗
  • Choice C — Since 2003, Louise Miller Cohen and Vermelle Rodrigues have worked to preserve Gullah culture through their museums.: "Since 2003" establishes ongoing duration, and "worked to preserve Gullah culture" states the purpose — both requirements met. ✓
  • Choice D — Influenced by the traditions of West and Central Africa, Gullah culture developed in parts of the southeastern United States in the 18th century.: describes the history of Gullah culture, not Cohen's and Rodrigues's work at all. ✗
That matches Choice C — Since 2003, Louise Miller Cohen and Vermelle Rodrigues have worked to preserve Gullah culture through their museums..
